351.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded them to sacrifice one sheep for every five from a flock.
351.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan mereka untuk menyembelih satu domba dari setiap lima ekor dari kawanan domba.

352.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever memorizes the first seven surahs of the Quran is a scholar.'
352.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang menghafal tujuh surah pertama Al-Quran adalah seorang ulama.'

353.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding Abu Bakr's words when fever overcame him: 'Every man faces death among his family, and death is nearer than his sandal strap.' And Bilal when his fever left him would sing: 'Would that I knew whether I shall spend a night in a valley with idhkhir and jalil around me, and whether I shall come one day to the waters of Majanna, and whether Shama and Tafil shall appear to me?'
353.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai kata-kata Abu Bakar ketika demam menguasainya: 'Setiap orang menghadapi kematian di antara keluarganya, dan kematian lebih dekat dari tali sandalnya.' Dan Bilal ketika demamnya berlalu akan bernyanyi: 'Andai aku tahu apakah aku akan menghabiskan malam di sebuah lembah dengan idzkhir dan jalil di sekelilingku, dan apakah aku akan datang suatu hari ke mata air Majanna, dan apakah Syama dan Tafil akan muncul di hadapanku?'

354.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Abyssinians were performing in the mosque before the Prophet ﷺ. I came to watch, and he kept lowering his shoulder for me to see them over it.'
354.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Orang-orang Habasyah sedang menampilkan pertunjukan di masjid di hadapan Nabi ﷺ. Aku datang untuk menonton, dan beliau terus merendahkan bahunya agar aku dapat melihat mereka dari atas bahunya.'

355.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she had a spear in her house. She was asked about it and said: 'We use it to kill the house lizards [geckos], for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ told us that when Ibrahim, peace be upon him, was thrown into the fire, there was no creature on earth that did not try to put it out, except the gecko — it used to blow on the fire. So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded us to kill it.'
355.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia memiliki sebuah tombak di rumahnya. Ia ditanya tentang itu dan berkata: 'Kami menggunakannya untuk membunuh tokek rumah, karena Rasulullah ﷺ memberitahu kami bahwa ketika Ibrahim, semoga keselamatan atasnya, dilempar ke dalam api, tidak ada makhluk di bumi yang tidak mencoba memadamkannya, kecuali tokek — ia biasa meniup apinya. Maka Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan kami untuk membunuhnya.'

356.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said regarding snakes in houses: 'Kill the one with two stripes and the abtar [tailless], for they damage eyesight and cause miscarriage. Whoever does not kill them is not from us.'
356.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda tentang ular di rumah-rumah: 'Bunuhlah yang memiliki dua garis dan abtar [yang tidak berekor], karena keduanya merusak penglihatan dan menyebabkan keguguran. Barangsiapa yang tidak membunuhnya bukan dari golongan kami.'

357.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she said: 'The most severely punished people on the Day of Resurrection will be those who imitate the creation of Allah.'
357.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia berkata: 'Orang yang paling keras siksaannya pada Hari Kiamat adalah mereka yang meniru ciptaan Allah.'

358.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ prayed eleven rak'ahs between the late Isha prayer and the break of dawn. He would give the salam after every two rak'ahs and perform witr with one. His prostrations lasted as long as it would take one of you to recite fifty verses. When the muadhdhin fell silent, he would rise, pray two short rak'ahs, then lie down on his right side until the muadhdhin came to announce the prayer.
358.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ shalat sebelas rakaat antara shalat Isya yang akhir dan terbitnya fajar. Beliau memberi salam setelah setiap dua rakaat dan witir dengan satu rakaat. Sujud beliau berlangsung selama yang diperlukan seseorang di antara kalian untuk membaca lima puluh ayat. Ketika muadzin diam, beliau bangkit, shalat dua rakaat yang ringan, kemudian berbaring di sisi kanannya hingga muadzin datang mengumumkan shalat.

359.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding Umm Habiba who had prolonged bleeding: the Prophet ﷺ said to her: 'This is not menstruation — it is a vein. When menstruation comes, leave off prayer; when it ends, bathe and pray.' Aisha said: She would bathe before every prayer and sit in a basin belonging to her sister Zaynab bint Jahsh until the redness of blood rose on the water.
359.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai Ummu Habibah yang mengalami perdarahan berkepanjangan: Nabi ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Ini bukan haid — ini adalah urat. Ketika haid datang, tinggalkan shalat; ketika selesai, mandilah dan shalatlah.' Aisyah berkata: Ia mandi sebelum setiap shalat dan duduk dalam sebuah baskom milik saudarinya Zainab binti Jahsy hingga warna merah darah naik ke permukaan air.

360.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray in his room while I was in the house. He would separate the even rak'ahs from the witr with a salam that we could hear.'
360.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat di ruangannya sementara aku di dalam rumah. Beliau memisahkan rakaat genap dari witir dengan salam yang dapat kami dengar.'

361.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The most beloved prayer to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was the one he prayed consistently.' Abu Salama said: 'Allah says: "And those who are steadfast in their prayers."'
361.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Shalat yang paling dicintai oleh Rasulullah ﷺ adalah yang beliau lakukan secara konsisten.' Abu Salamah berkata: 'Allah berfirman: "Dan mereka yang tekun dalam shalatnya."'

362.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that on an Eid day, the Prophet ﷺ was covered with his garment and two girls were singing. Abu Bakr reprimanded them, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ uncovered his face and said: 'Leave them, Abu Bakr — these are days of celebration.'
362.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa pada hari raya, Nabi ﷺ diselimuti pakaiannya dan dua gadis sedang bernyanyi. Abu Bakar menegur mereka, dan Rasulullah ﷺ membuka wajahnya dan berkata: 'Biarkan mereka, Abu Bakar — ini adalah hari-hari perayaan.'

363.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ covering me with his robe while I watched the Abyssinians playing in the mosque until I was the one who tired of watching. So judge by the standard of the young girl who is eager for entertainment.'
363.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ menutupi aku dengan jubahnya sementara aku menonton orang-orang Habasyah bermain di masjid hingga akulah yang bosan menonton. Maka ukurlah dengan standar seorang gadis muda yang bersemangat untuk hiburan.'

364.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not fast more of any month throughout the year than Sha'ban — he used to fast it entirely.'
364.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak berpuasa lebih banyak dari bulan manapun sepanjang tahun daripada bulan Sya'ban — beliau biasa berpuasa seluruhnya.'

365.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said to Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Bakr: 'O Abd al-Rahman, perform a thorough ablution, for I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "Woe to the heels from the Fire."'
365.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata kepada Abdurrahman bin Abi Bakr: 'Wahai Abdurrahman, lakukan wudhu yang sempurna, karena aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Celakalah tumit-tumit dari neraka."'

366.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she set up a tent during i'tikaf and Zaynab did the same, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw the tents after prayer and said: 'What is this?' They told him. He said: 'Did you intend righteousness by this? I will not perform i'tikaf.' He returned and when Ramadan ended, he performed i'tikaf for ten days in Shawwal.
366.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ia mendirikan tenda saat i'tikaf dan Zainab melakukan hal yang sama, Rasulullah ﷺ melihat tenda-tenda itu setelah shalat dan berkata: 'Apa ini?' Mereka memberitahunya. Beliau berkata: 'Apakah kalian berniat kebaikan dengan ini? Aku tidak akan beri'tikaf.' Beliau kembali dan ketika Ramadan berakhir, beliau beri'tikaf selama sepuluh hari di bulan Syawal.

367.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the two rak'ahs after Asr that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed. She said: 'Yes, he prayed them.'
367.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang dua rakaat setelah Ashar yang dilaksanakan oleh Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia berkata: 'Ya, beliau melaksanakannya.'

368.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Allah knows best what they would have done.'
368.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Allah lebih mengetahui apa yang akan mereka lakukan.'

369.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Nothing cuts the prayer of a Muslim except a donkey, a disbeliever, a dog, and a woman.' Aisha said: 'O Messenger of Allah, you have equated us to evil animals!'
369.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada yang memutus shalat seorang Muslim kecuali keledai, orang kafir, anjing, dan wanita.' Aisyah berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, engkau telah menyamakan kami dengan binatang-binatang buruk!'

370.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Ill omen is bad character.'
370.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sial itu adalah akhlak yang buruk.'

371.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a mukatab [slave seeking emancipation] came to her with the remainder of his emancipation payment. She said to him: 'You will not visit me again after this. Go and strive in the path of Allah, for I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "No Muslim whose heart is touched by the dust of the path of Allah will Allah cause the Fire to touch him."'
371.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang mukatab [budak yang sedang mencari kemerdekaan] datang kepadanya dengan sisa pembayaran pembebasannya. Ia berkata kepadanya: 'Kamu tidak akan mengunjungiku lagi setelah ini. Pergilah dan berjuanglah di jalan Allah, karena aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada seorang Muslim yang hatinya tersentuh debu jalan Allah yang Allah biarkan api neraka menyentuhnya."'

372.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Whenever the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was given a choice between two matters in Islam, he always chose the easier of the two.'
372.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Setiap kali Rasulullah ﷺ diberi pilihan antara dua hal dalam Islam, beliau selalu memilih yang lebih mudah di antara keduanya.'

373.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the muadhdhin called for the final Fajr prayer, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would pray two short rak'ahs, then lie down on his right side until the muadhdhin came to announce the prayer.
373.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika muadzin mengumandangkan adzan terakhir untuk shalat Fajar, Rasulullah ﷺ shalat dua rakaat yang ringan, kemudian berbaring di sisi kanannya hingga muadzin datang mengumumkan shalat.

374.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never performed the voluntary Duha prayer, whether traveling or at home.'
374.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah melakukan shalat sunnah Dhuha, baik saat bepergian maupun di rumah.'

375.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ was in my room, covering me with his robe while I watched the Abyssinians playing in the mosque until I was the one who tired of it. Judge by the standard of a young eager girl fond of entertainment.'
375.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ berada di ruanganku, menutupi aku dengan jubahnya sementara aku menonton orang-orang Habasyah bermain di masjid hingga akulah yang bosan. Ukurlah dengan standar seorang gadis muda yang bersemangat dan suka hiburan.'

376.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Indeed, Allah loves gentleness in all matters.'
376.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah mencintai kelembutan dalam semua urusan.'

377.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray Asr while the sun was still up in my room.'
377.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat Ashar sementara matahari masih bersinar di ruanganku.'

378.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wanted to sleep, he would perform ablution as for prayer.'
378.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ ingin tidur, beliau berwudhu seperti wudhu untuk shalat.'

379.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she brought a cloth with images on it, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ tore it and said: 'The most severely punished people on the Day of Resurrection will be those who imitate the creation of Allah Almighty.'
379.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia membawa sehelai kain yang bergambar, dan Rasulullah ﷺ merobek kain itu dan berkata: 'Orang yang paling keras siksaannya pada Hari Kiamat adalah mereka yang meniru ciptaan Allah Yang Maha Agung.'

380.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with my own hands. He would then not avoid anything that was permissible. We only know of one thing that becomes forbidden except through tawaf around the House.'
380.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa memintal untaian untuk hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ dengan tanganku sendiri. Kemudian beliau tidak menjauhi apapun yang diizinkan. Kami hanya tahu satu hal yang menjadi terlarang kecuali melalui tawaf mengelilingi Ka'bah.'

381.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was told about a woman from his family who was menstruating. He said: 'Ruined! Has she kept us here?' They said: 'She has already performed the circumambulation on the Day of Sacrifice.' So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ departed with her.
381.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ diberitahu tentang seorang wanita dari keluarganya yang sedang haid. Beliau bersabda: 'Celaka! Apakah ia menahan kita di sini?' Mereka berkata: 'Ia telah melakukan tawaf pada Hari Kurban.' Maka Rasulullah ﷺ berangkat bersamanya.

382.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'By Allah, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ never prayed the Duha prayer, though I do pray it. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to leave an action he loved to do, fearing people would follow his example and it would become obligatory for them. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ preferred whatever was least burdensome for people among obligatory duties.'
382.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Demi Allah, Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah shalat Dhuha, meskipun aku melaksanakannya. Rasulullah ﷺ biasa meninggalkan suatu amalan yang beliau sukai untuk dilakukan, karena khawatir orang-orang akan mengikuti contohnya dan itu menjadi wajib bagi mereka. Rasulullah ﷺ lebih menyukai apa yang paling ringan bagi orang-orang di antara kewajiban-kewajiban.'

383.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that during his final illness, the Prophet ﷺ asked about some gold coins. When she brought seven or nine of them, he said: 'What would Muhammad think if he were to meet Allah Almighty while these were with him? And what would remain of Muhammad if he were to meet Allah while these were with him?' He then spent them.
383.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dalam sakit terakhirnya, Nabi ﷺ menanyakan beberapa koin emas. Ketika ia membawa tujuh atau sembilan keping, beliau berkata: 'Apa yang akan Muhammad pikirkan jika ia bertemu Allah Yang Maha Agung sementara ini ada padanya? Dan apa yang tersisa dari Muhammad jika ia bertemu Allah sementara ini ada padanya?' Kemudian beliau membelanjakannya.

384.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Month after month, no fire would be lit in any of the houses of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.' She was asked: 'O aunt, how did you survive?' She said: 'On the two black things — dates and water.'
384.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Bulan demi bulan, tidak ada api yang dinyalakan di satupun dari rumah-rumah Rasulullah ﷺ.' Ia ditanya: 'Wahai bibi, bagaimana kalian bertahan hidup?' Ia berkata: 'Dari dua hal hitam — kurma dan air.'

385.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray at night while I was lying across between him and the qibla.'
385.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat malam sementara aku berbaring melintang antara beliau dan kiblat.'

386.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ entered while she was behind a curtain with images on it. He tore it and said: 'The most severely punished of people on the Day of Resurrection will be those who imitate the creation of Allah Almighty.'
386.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk sementara ia berada di balik tirai yang bergambar. Beliau merobek tirai itu dan berkata: 'Orang yang paling keras siksaannya pada Hari Kiamat adalah mereka yang meniru ciptaan Allah Yang Maha Agung.'

387.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would come to me while he was in i'tikaf in the mosque and lean on the doorframe of my room. I would wash his head while I was in my room and the rest of his body was in the mosque.'
387.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ datang kepadaku sementara beliau beri'tikaf di masjid dan bersandar pada ambang pintu ruanganku. Aku mencuci kepalanya sementara aku berada di ruanganku dan sisa tubuhnya ada di masjid.'

388.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she experienced postpartum bleeding while she had her head bowed, the Prophet ﷺ said to her: 'Are you experiencing nifas?' She said: 'Yes, O Messenger of Allah.' She added: 'I thought women were created only for hardship.' He said: 'No, it is something that Allah has tested the women of the children of Adam with.'
388.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ia mengalami nifas sementara kepalanya tertunduk, Nabi ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Apakah kamu mengalami nifas?' Ia berkata: 'Ya, wahai Rasulullah.' Ia menambahkan: 'Aku pikir wanita diciptakan hanya untuk kesulitan.' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak, itu adalah sesuatu yang Allah telah uji wanita-wanita anak cucu Adam dengannya.'

389.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said to Uthman three times: 'O Uthman, Allah may clothe you with a garment, and if the hypocrites want you to take it off, do not take it off until you meet me.' She said: 'I forgot this, by Allah, and then it came back to me.' And Mu'awiya wrote to her about it.
389.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada Utsman tiga kali: 'Wahai Utsman, Allah mungkin akan mendandanimu dengan sebuah pakaian, dan jika orang-orang munafik menginginkanmu untuk melepaskannya, jangan lepaskan hingga kamu bertemu denganku.' Ia berkata: 'Aku melupakan ini, demi Allah, kemudian kembali kepadaku.' Dan Mu'awiyah menulis kepadanya tentang hal itu.

390.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ drank standing and sitting, walked barefoot and with sandals, and turned away to the right and to the left.
390.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ minum dalam keadaan berdiri dan duduk, berjalan tanpa alas kaki dan dengan sandal, dan berpaling ke kanan dan ke kiri.

391.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ called the gecko a little evildoer, but she did not hear him command that it be killed.
391.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyebut tokek sebagai fasik kecil, tetapi ia tidak mendengar beliau memerintahkan untuk membunuhnya.

392.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Five animals are all harmful and may be killed in the sacred precincts: the vicious dog, the scorpion, the kite, the crow, and the mouse.'
392.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Lima hewan semuanya berbahaya dan boleh dibunuh di tanah suci: anjing yang galak, kalajengking, elang, gagak, dan tikus.'

393.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Prophet ﷺ about soothsayers. He said: 'They are nothing.' She said: 'O Messenger of Allah, they sometimes tell something true.' He said: 'That is the word of truth that the jinn snatches and whispers into the ear of his ally, like the clucking of a hen, and they mix with it more than a hundred lies.'
393.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang para peramal. Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka tidak ada apa-apanya.' Ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, mereka terkadang mengatakan sesuatu yang benar.' Beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah kata kebenaran yang jin rampas dan dibisikkan ke telinga sekutunya, seperti kotek ayam, dan mereka mencampurkannya dengan lebih dari seratus kedustaan.'

394.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that after the eclipse prayer, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ praised Allah and said: 'The sun and the moon are two of the signs of Allah Almighty. They do not eclipse for the death or life of anyone. So when you see them, rush to prayer.'
394.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa setelah shalat gerhana, Rasulullah ﷺ memuji Allah dan bersabda: 'Matahari dan bulan adalah dua dari tanda-tanda Allah Yang Maha Agung. Keduanya tidak gerhana karena kematian atau kehidupan seseorang. Maka ketika kalian melihatnya, bersegeralah untuk shalat.'

395.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a woman came to her with her two daughters asking for charity. Aisha had nothing but a single date, which she gave her. The woman split it between her two daughters without eating any herself. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came in, she told him. He said: 'Whoever is tested with daughters and treats them well — they will be a shield for him from the Fire.'
395.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita datang kepadanya dengan dua putrinya meminta sedekah. Aisyah tidak memiliki apa-apa kecuali satu kurma, yang ia berikan kepadanya. Wanita itu membagi kurma itu antara dua putrinya tanpa memakannya sendiri. Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ masuk, ia menceritakannya. Beliau bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang diuji dengan anak-anak perempuan dan memperlakukan mereka dengan baik — mereka akan menjadi perisai baginya dari neraka.'

396.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'There is no calamity that afflicts a Muslim except that Allah expiates it for him — even a thorn that pricks him.'
396.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada musibah yang menimpa seorang Muslim kecuali Allah menghapus dosanya karenanya — bahkan duri yang menusuknya.'

397.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'O Aisha, this is Jibreel, peace be upon him, and he conveys his greetings to you.' She said: 'And upon him be peace and the mercy of Allah.' She added: 'He sees what we cannot see.'
397.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai Aisyah, ini adalah Jibril, semoga keselamatan atasnya, dan ia menyampaikan salam kepadamu.' Ia berkata: 'Dan atasnya juga salam dan rahmat Allah.' Ia menambahkan: 'Beliau melihat apa yang tidak dapat kita lihat.'

398.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Zaynab bint Jahsh came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'Your wives have sent me to ask you for equity regarding the daughter of Abu Quhafa.' Aisha said: 'Then Zaynab attacked me, and I kept watching the Prophet ﷺ to see when he would give me permission to respond. He remained neutral until I knew he would not be displeased if I defended myself. So I responded to Zaynab, and she was silenced.'
398.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Zainab binti Jahsy datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Istri-istrimu telah mengutus aku untuk meminta keadilan kepadamu mengenai putri Abu Quhafah.' Aisyah berkata: 'Kemudian Zainab menyerangku, dan aku terus memandang Nabi ﷺ untuk melihat kapan beliau memberi izin kepadaku untuk membalas. Beliau tetap netral hingga aku tahu beliau tidak akan keberatan jika aku membela diri. Maka aku membalas Zainab, dan ia terdiam.'

399.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray eleven rak'ahs at night — that was his prayer. Each prostration lasted as long as it takes one of you to recite fifty verses before raising the head. He would pray two rak'ahs before Fajr, then lie down on his right side until the caller came for prayer.
399.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat sebelas rakaat di malam hari — itulah shalatnya. Setiap sujud berlangsung selama yang diperlukan seseorang di antara kalian untuk membaca lima puluh ayat sebelum mengangkat kepala. Beliau shalat dua rakaat sebelum Fajar, kemudian berbaring di sisi kanannya hingga pemanggil datang untuk shalat.

400.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to seek refuge in prayer from sin and debt. Someone asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, how often you seek refuge from debt!' He said: 'When a man is in debt, he speaks and lies, and he promises and breaks his promise.'
400.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa berlindung dalam shalat dari dosa dan hutang. Seseorang bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, betapa seringnya engkau berlindung dari hutang!' Beliau bersabda: 'Ketika seseorang memiliki hutang, ia berbicara dan berdusta, dan ia berjanji dan mengingkari janjinya.'
